title: Chroma Realms
description: Immerse yourself in the challenging challenge of researching measurements, mines and mob behavior in the Chroma Realms mod!
body:
# Chroma Realms
There are 4 worlds in the mod, many strong mobs and bosses, as well as tools and blocks! The mod is updated, and the bugs are fixed. Stay tuned for new updates!

## Mobs
Now in this mod you can spawn and see 8 mobs:
- Chroma Cow
- Chroma Pig
- Boss Zombie
- Boss Cow
- Boss Spider
- Boss Chicken
- Best dog ever
- Demon Villager

## Worlds
Now in this mod you can activate 4 portals:
- Chroma World
- Chroma Realm
- Metaverse
- Purgatory

## Ores, ingots
Now in this mod you can find 5 ores
- Andrezite ore - Andrezite Ingot
- Mytherite ore - Mytherite Ingot
- Realmize ore - Realmize Ingot
- Chroma ore - Chroma Dust - Chroma Ingot
- Mikolite ore - Mikolite Ingot

## Tools
Now in this mod you can craft 9 tools
- Andrezite pickaxe
- Mytherite pickaxe
- Realmize pickaxe
- Chroma pickaxe (3x3 mining)
- Chroma World Portal Igniter
- Chroma Realm Portal Igniter
- Meta Verse Portal Igniter
- Brokened Igniter
- Disc Launcher

## Food
Now in this mod you can eat 6 food
- Boss meat
- Baked boss meat
- Bloody eye
- Poop
- Rib
- Brain
